input.background: Telephone surveys may use a telephone directory to identify individuals for study.
input.question: Speculate on the type of household that would be undercovered by using this sampling frame.

output.answer: This sampling frame omits households which lack land telephones lines. It also excludes those with unlisted numbers and double counts those with more than one phone line.

household_type.description: The type of household that may be undercovered by using a telephone directory as a sampling frame.
